title: 12 Inch Foam Wreath Ring | 2 Pack | Circle Rings with Plastic Backing for Crafting, Floral Designs, and Wreath Making | Professional Florists Choice Rings for Long-Lasting Displays & Arrangements
features: PROFESSIONAL WREATH RING FLORAL FOAM - The Florists Choice of flower arranging accessories. Use the same floral foam bricks as a professional florists to make stunning fresh flower arragements for birthdays, weddings or Funerals
SIZE - Pack of 2 x 12 inch (31cm) plastic backed wreath rings
USE - Suitable for Fresh Flowers and Foilage, Classic ring frames, ideal as wreaths as well as table arrangements, can be hung outdoors
HOMELAND FLORISTS - Shop with us on Amazon to send Florist quality fresh flowers and Sundries directly from our family-run store, trusted by our local customers for over 40 years
description: Product Description PROFESSIONAL 12 INCH WREATH RING FLORAL FOAM Provides longer life for flowers - UP TO 50 per cent longer - than in previous floral foam. Can be hung or laid flat to your design Wet Flower Foam feature quick saturation, low drainage. A labour saving product that saves time and trouble, and most important of all gives you the security of knowing that your flowers are secure and firmly placed in the design. To create flower arrangements where the foam provides support and a water source to the stems inserted into it. Safety Warning Eye Contact: Immediately flush eyes with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes, occasionally lifting the upper and lower eyelids. Check for and remove any contact lenses. Ingestion: If swallowed, rinse mouth with water (only if the person is conscious). Get medical attention if you feel unwell
